ddls:
CREATE TABLE "switches" (
  "switch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each switch */,
  "switch_name" TEXT /* Name of the switch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the switch */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address for the switch configuration */,
  "switch_model" TEXT /* Model of the switch */,
  "switch_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the switch */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the switch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("switch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "switch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the switch this configuration applies to */,
  "flow_control_mode" INTEGER /* Flow control mode setting */,
  "no_excessive_collision" INTEGER /* Flag for excessive collision handling */,
  "huge_packet_support" INTEGER /* Flag for huge packet support */,
  "legal_max_packet_size" INTEGER /* Flag for legal maximum packet size check */,
  "priority_buffer_reserve" INTEGER /* Flag for priority buffer reserve */,
  "vlan_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if VLAN is enabled */,
  "vlan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VLAN if enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_switch_id FOREIGN KEY ("switch_id") REFERENCES switches ("switch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_control_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow control mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flow control mode */,
  "mode_type" TEXT /* Type of flow control (e.g., IEEE 802.1Qbb) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collision_handling" (
  "collision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collision handling method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collision handling method */,
  "collision_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for collision handling (number of collisions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_size_limits" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packet size limit setting */,
  "max_size" INTEGER /* Maximum packet size in bytes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the packet size setting */,
  "fragmentation_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if packet fragmentation is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buffer_reserve" (
  "buffer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buffer reserve setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the buffer reserve */,
  "buffer_size" INTEGER /* Size of the buffer in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buffer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "switch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the switch whose configuration was changed */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, remove) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_switch_id FOREIGN KEY ("switch_id") REFERENCES switches ("switch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, technician) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission setting */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role the permission applies to */,
  "can_update" INTEGER /* Can the role update configurations? */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Can the role view configurations? */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Can the role delete configurations? */,
  "can_configure" INTEGER /* Can the role configure switches? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "switch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the switch that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., collision, packet drop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was generated */,
  "acknowledged" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert has been acknowledged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_switch_id FOREIGN KEY ("switch_id") REFERENCES switches ("switch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic stat entry */,
  "switch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the switch being monitored */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "traffic_volume" REAL /* Volume of traffic in MB */,
  "collision_count" INTEGER /* Number of collisions recorded */,
  "packet_drop_count" INTEGER /* Number of packet drops recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_stats_switch_id FOREIGN KEY ("switch_id") REFERENCES switches ("switch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "switch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the switch that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for next maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_switch_id FOREIGN KEY ("switch_id") REFERENCES switches ("switch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vlans" (
  "vlan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VLAN */,
  "vlan_name" TEXT /* Name of the VLAN */,
  "vlan_description" TEXT /* Description of the VLAN */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vlan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "switch_vlan_bindings" (
  "binding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VLAN-switch binding */,
  "switch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the switch */,
  "vlan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VLAN */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the binding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("binding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_switch_vlan_bindings_switch_id FOREIGN KEY ("switch_id") REFERENCES switches ("switch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_switch_vlan_bindings_vlan_id FOREIGN KEY ("vlan_id") REFERENCES vlans ("vlan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "switch_port_configurations" (
  "port_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port configuration */,
  "switch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the switch */,
  "port_number" INTEGER /* Number of the port */,
  "port_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the port (e.g., access, trunk) */,
  "port_speed" TEXT /* Speed of the port (e.g., 100Mbps, 1Gbps) */,
  "port_duplex" TEXT /* Duplex setting of the port (e.g., full, half) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_switch_port_configurations_switch_id FOREIGN KEY ("switch_id") REFERENCES switches ("switch_id")
)
